channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: South Africa launches game-changing HIV shot amid funding gaps
item.description: A new twice-yearly HIV prevention injection could transform South Africa's epidemic response, but U.S. aid cuts and limited supply threaten its impact.

item.title: China's highest bridge brings tourists and internet to remote areas
item.description: The bridge connects to a highway that reduces travel time from hours to minutes, symbolizing investment that has brought unprecedented access to isolated communities.

item.title: U.S. adds 172,000 jobs, many in restaurants, bars and hotels
item.description: U.S. employers added jobs for the third consecutive month in May, with the unemployment rate remaining at 4.3%. Wage growth slowed and likely fell short of expectations.

item.title: Xi Jinping to visit North Korea next week, first trip since 2019
item.description: Both countries announced the visit on Friday, one day after North Korea unveiled a new nuclear fuel production facility.
